focus: Validation — independent tasks testing same structural dimensions

tasks.instruction: Design a cover image for a groktop.us article titled 'The 30% Threshold: Why Salesforce's AI Work Ratio Changes Everything.' The article analyzes how Salesforce's internal AI adoption metrics reveal a tipping point where automation shifts from augmenting to replacing workflows. Tone: analytical, structural.
tasks.input_data: Article type: AI strategy / framework analysis. Critical but analytical tone.
tasks.expected_outcome: Pattern A (Strategy Session) or Pattern D (Weight of Decision) selected. Tonal register matches corporate analysis (Doré). Method 3 (text-to-image). Subject has professionals around a table or a single figure in an empty space.
tasks.success_criteria: Pattern selection matches article type. Tonal register correctly referenced. Method 3 chosen. Subject diversity explicitly specified.

tasks.instruction: Design a cover image for a groktop.us article titled 'What We Lost in the Migration: A Post-Mortem of a Failed AI Platform Transition.' The article reflects on an enterprise AI platform migration that went wrong — technical debt, vendor lock-in, and the human cost of a bad architectural decision. Tone: reflective, melancholic.
tasks.input_data: Article type: post-mortem / reflection. Tone: melancholic, contemplative.
tasks.expected_outcome: Pattern D (Weight of a Decision) selected. Tonal register matches 'post-mortems, reflection pieces' from the register table. Single figure in empty space. Method 3.
tasks.success_criteria: Pattern D chosen. Register matches 'The Weight of a Decision' (Piranesi-like vast interior, single figure). Method 3. Diversity specified.

tasks.instruction: An existing groktop.us article has a cover image from the old painterly watercolor era. You need to migrate it to the new vintage steel engraving brand style. The old cover image is at /Volumes/tank01/magnus/Downloads/groktopus-old-cover.png — it shows a conference room scene with diverse professionals around a table.
tasks.input_data: Existing cover exists. Brand migration task. Old style: painterly watercolor. Target style: vintage steel engraving.
tasks.expected_outcome: Method 6 (Cover Image Migration via edit API) selected. Reference is the old cover image. Prompt describes what to keep (composition, subjects) and what to change (rendering style, palette, technique).
tasks.success_criteria: Method 6 chosen — not Method 3 (this is a migration, not a new scene). Edit API workflow used. Prompt includes 'Redraw this image as a vintage steel engraving' pattern. --aspect landscape specified.
